FB6C7C44E4160C192668E06D7568ACB4: After you've finished the translation process using the Inception Translation Tool, you can export a Language Pack file (.irlanguage) and then upload it to the Inception controller from a PC. To upload a language pack, click the Manage Languages button, then click the Upload button and choose the file on disk that you want to upload. Upon being uploaded successfully, the language pack should appear in the list of available languages in the Manage Languages dialog box. From here, you can select the desired language from the list and click Apply in order to change the current language of the Inception controller (this action requires rebooting the device).
